description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-nav

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-nav/`
**Sub-components:** hx-nav-item

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Active indicator, hover, spacing, divider. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. nav landmark with aria-label. Current page (aria-current). Keyboard navigation.
3. **Functionality** — Horizontal/vertical. Active item. Nested items. Collapsible groups. Icons. Badges.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Active indicator animation. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Both nav + nav-item documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Navigation. Active state. Keyboard. Nested.
8. **Storybook** — Horizontal/vertical. With icons. Active. Nested.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Menu block. Main navigation. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-nav
